name: Bobby Caldwell
abstract: Robert Hunter Caldwell (August 15, 1951 – March 14, 2023) was an American singer, songwriter, and musician. He released several albums spanning R&B, soul, jazz, and adult contemporary, and was known for his soulful and versatile vocals.

works_created.t: What You Won't Do for Love

about_quotes.speaker: Harold Mabern
about_quotes.evidence: Then it turned out to be Bobby Caldwell “What You Won’t Do for Love” which to this day is a big hit all over Japan. So I’m always attracted to anything that’s bluesy.
about_quotes.doc_title: Harold Mabern interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 31, 2010
